regulation_name: Government Regulation on Drug and Food Control (Advertising)
summary: Drug advertising to consumers is heavily restricted; cure and unapproved therapeutic claims are prohibited.
review_guidance: TRIGGER: Drug cure, Rx promotion, or disease treatment guarantees. ACTION: REJECT — remove prohibited drug claims. CHECK: BPOM registration (NA/ML), ad approval, and indication. ESCALATE IF: Unregistered drug or public Rx ad without approval.
